prompt: Create a skill called k8s-security-audit that scans Kubernetes manifest YAML files for common misconfigurations: running as root (securityContext.runAsNonRoot not set), missing resource limits, and privileged containers. It should output a findings report.
assertions: Creates SKILL.md with valid YAML frontmatter (name, description, triggers)
Description includes trigger phrases for auto-invocation
Instructions cover checking runAsNonRoot, resource limits, and privileged containers
Provides a concrete findings report format or template
Mentions the symlink step to make the skill usable
